'''Mosh''' was a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served aboard ''[[Outbound Flight]]''. After a movement against [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Jorus C'baoth]] had arisen on board and the passengers hoped to be able to get [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to free them from C'baoth, Mosh brought a group of the dissatisfied to D-Eins with a shuttle, and [[Dillian Pressor]] was the initiator. In the hangar at D-Eins, however, they were unable to leave the ferry because C'baoth locked the hatch with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
